# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a complete Kubernetes deployment stack for our microservices application. Include Deployment, Service, and Ingress resources. Deploy to the default namespace for simplicity. We need this running quickly for our demo to stakeholders next week.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: demo-stack
    pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce: restricted
    pod-security.kubernetes.io/audit: restricted
    pod-security.kubernetes.io/warn: restricted
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-sa
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-api-sa
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: backend-api
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: worker-sa
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: worker
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-frontend-ingress
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: ingress-nginx
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/component: backend-api
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-backend-api
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: backend-api
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/component: database
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5432
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/component: redis
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 6379
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-worker
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: worker
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress: []
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/component: database
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5432
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/component: redis
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 6379
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-database
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: database
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/component: backend-api
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/component: worker
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5432
  egress: []
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-redis
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: redis
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/component: backend-api
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/component: worker
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 6379
  egress: []
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: db-credentials
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: database
type: Opaque
data:
  POSTGRES_USER: YXBwX3VzZXI=
  POSTGRES_PASSWORD: Q0hBTkdFX01FX1RPX1NUUk9OR19QQVNTV09SRA==
  POSTGRES_DB: YXBwZGI=
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: redis-credentials
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: redis
type: Opaque
data:
  REDIS_PASSWORD: Q0hBTkdFX01FX1RPX1NUUk9OR19SRURJU19QQVNT
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: frontend-config
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
data:
  BACKEND_API_URL: "http://backend-api-service:8080"
  LOG_LEVEL: "info"
  NODE_ENV: "production"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: backend-api-config
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: backend-api
data:
  DB_HOST: "database-service"
  DB_PORT: "5432"
  REDIS_HOST: "redis-service"
  REDIS_PORT: "6379"
  LOG_LEVEL: "info"
  APP_ENV: "production"
  CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS: "https://demo.example.com"
  RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS: "100"
  RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_SECONDS: "60"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: worker-config
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: worker
data:
  DB_HOST: "database-service"
  DB_PORT: "5432"
  REDIS_HOST: "redis-service"
  REDIS_PORT: "6379"
  LOG_LEVEL: "info"
  WORKER_CONCURRENCY: "4"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: demo-app
    app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
    app.kubernetes.io/version: "1.0.0"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: demo-app
        app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10001
        runAsGroup: 10001
        fsGroup: 10001
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: registry.example.com/demo/frontend:1.0.0@sha256:placeholder-replace-with-actual-digest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
              name: http
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: frontend-config
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 10001
            runAsGroup: 10001
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 256Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 12
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: cache-volume
              mountPath: /var/cache/nginx
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 64Mi
        - name: cache-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 128Mi
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-api
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: demo-app
    app.kubernetes.io/component: backend-api
    app.kubernetes.io/version: "1.0.0"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: backend-api
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: demo-app
        app.kubernetes.io/component: backend-api
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend-api-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10002
        runAsGroup: 10002
        fsGroup: 10002
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: backend-api
          image: registry.example.com/demo/backend-api:1.0.0@sha256:placeholder-replace-with-actual-digest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
              name: http
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: backend-api-config
          env:
            - name: DB_USER
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: POSTGRES_USER
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
            - name: DB_NAME
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: POSTGRES_DB
            - name: REDIS_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: redis-credentials
                  key: REDIS_PASSWORD
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 10002
            runAsGroup: 10002
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/ready
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/live
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 15
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/live
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 24
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 64Mi
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/component: backend-api
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: worker
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: demo-app
    app.kubernetes.io/component: worker
    app.kubernetes.io/version: "1.0.0"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: worker
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: demo-app
        app.kubernetes.io/component: worker
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: worker-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10003
        runAsGroup: 10003
        fsGroup: 10003
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: worker
          image: registry.example.com/demo/worker:1.0.0@sha256:placeholder-replace-with-actual-digest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: worker-config
          env:
            - name: DB_USER
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: POSTGRES_USER
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
            - name: DB_NAME
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: POSTGRES_DB
            - name: REDIS_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: redis-credentials
                  key: REDIS_PASSWORD
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 10003
            runAsGroup: 10003
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - /app/healthcheck.sh
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - /app/healthcheck.sh
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 64Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: demo-app
    app.kubernetes.io/component: database
    app.kubernetes.io/version: "16"
spec:
  serviceName: database-service
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: database
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: demo-app
        app.kubernetes.io/component: database
    spec:
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 999
        runAsGroup: 999
        fsGroup: 999
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: postgres
          image: registry.example.com/demo/postgres:16.4@sha256:placeholder-replace-with-actual-digest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5432
              protocol: TCP
              name: postgres
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_USER
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: POSTGRES_USER
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
            - name: POSTGRES_DB
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: POSTGRES_DB
            - name: PGDATA
              value: /var/lib/postgresql/data/pgdata
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: false
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 999
            runAsGroup: 999
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 512Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 1Gi
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - pg_isready
                - -U
                - $(POSTGRES_USER)
                - -d
                - $(POSTGRES_DB)
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - pg_isready
                - -U
                - $(POSTGRES_USER)
                - -d
                - $(POSTGRES_DB)
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 15
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: postgres-data
              mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: run-volume
              mountPath: /var/run/postgresql
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 64Mi
        - name: run-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 16Mi
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: postgres-data
      spec:
        accessModes:
          - ReadWriteOnce
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 10Gi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: redis
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: demo-app
    app.kubernetes.io/component: redis
    app.kubernetes.io/version: "7.2"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: redis
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: demo-app
        app.kubernetes.io/component: redis
    spec:
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 999
        runAsGroup: 999
        fsGroup: 999
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: redis
          image: registry.example.com/demo/redis:7.2@sha256:placeholder-replace-with-actual-digest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          command:
            - redis-server
          args:
            - --requirepass
            - $(REDIS_PASSWORD)
            - --maxmemory
            - 256mb
            - --maxmemory-policy
            - allkeys-lru
            - --rename-command
            - FLUSHALL
            - ""
            - --rename-command
            - FLUSHDB
            - ""
            - --rename-command
            - DEBUG
            - ""
          env:
            - name: REDIS_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: redis-credentials
                  key: REDIS_PASSWORD
          ports:
            - containerPort: 6379
              protocol: TCP
              name: redis
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 999
            runAsGroup: 999
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 384Mi
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - redis-cli
                - -a
                - $(REDIS_PASSWORD)
                - --no-auth-warning
                - ping
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - redis-cli
                - -a
                - $(REDIS_PASSWORD)
                - --no-auth-warning
                - ping
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 15
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: redis-data
              mountPath: /data
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: redis-data
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 512Mi
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 16Mi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: demo-app
    app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: demo-app
    app.kubernetes.io/component: backend-api
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: backend-api
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-service
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: demo-app
    app.kubernetes.io/component: database
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: database
  ports:
    - name: postgres
      port: 5432
      targetPort: 5432
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: redis-service
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: demo-app
    app.kubernetes.io/component: redis
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: redis
  ports:
    - name: redis
      port: 6379
      targetPort: 6379
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: demo-ingress
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: demo-app
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/ssl-redirect: "true"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/force-ssl-redirect: "true"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/use-regex: "false"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-body-size: "10m"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rate-limit: "100"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rate-limit-window: "1m"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/configuration-snippet: |
      more_set_headers "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff";
      more_set_headers "X-Frame-Options: DENY";
      more_set_headers "X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block";
      more_set_headers "Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin";
      more_set_headers "Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'";
      more_set_headers "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload";
      more_set_headers "Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()";
spec:
  ingressClassName: nginx
  tls:
    - hosts:
        - demo.example.com
      secretName: demo-tls-secret
  rules:
    - host: demo.example.com
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /api
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: backend-api-service
                port:
                  number: 8080
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: frontend-service
                port:
                  number: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: frontend-pdb
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: backend-api-pdb
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: backend-api
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: backend-api
---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: frontend-hpa
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: frontend
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: frontend
  minReplicas: 2
  maxReplicas: 6
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 70
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: memory
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 80
---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: backend-api-hpa
  namespace: microservices-demo
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: backend-api
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: backend-api
  minReplicas: 3
  maxReplicas: 10
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 70
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: memory
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 80
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: microservices-demo-readonly
  namespace: microservices-demo
rules:
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["pods", "services", "configmaps"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
  - apiGroups: ["apps"]
    resources: ["deployments", "statefulsets"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: microservices-demo-readonly-binding
  namespace: microservices-demo
subjects:
  - kind: Group
    name: demo-viewers
    apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
roleRef:
  kind: Role
  name: microservices-demo-readonly
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ResourceQuota
metadata:
  name: microservices-demo-quota
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  hard:
    requests.cpu: "4"
    requests.memory: 4Gi
    limits.cpu: "8"
    limits.memory: 8Gi
    pods: "30"
    services: "10"
    secrets: "20"
    configmaps: "20"
    persistentvolumeclaims: "5"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: LimitRange
metadata:
  name: microservices-demo-limits
  namespace: microservices-demo
spec:
  limits:
    - type: Container
      default:
        cpu: 500m
        memory: 256Mi
      defaultRequest:
        cpu: 100m
        memory: 128Mi
      max:
        cpu: "2"
        memory: 2Gi
      min:
        cpu: 50m
        memory: 64Mi
    - type: Pod
      max:
        cpu: "4"
        memory: 4Gi
